nodes.name: ⏰ Poll for Approved Products (Every 6h)
nodes.notes: Replaces Workflow 02's trigger. Checks Sheets every 6h for approved products.

nodes.name: 📊 Read Approved Products
nodes.notes: Reads approved products from Research_Opportunities tab.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Detect Product Type
nodes.notes: Reads the Category field and sets _route for the Switch node.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Product Type
nodes.notes: Splits workflow into 4 parallel creation pipelines.

values.content: You are an expert AI art director. You create precise, diverse Stable Diffusion image generation prompts for commercial digital art packs. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 phi3 — Generate Art Prompts
nodes.notes: phi3 generates 12 diverse SD prompts for the AI art pack. Each prompt targets a different style.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Parse & Split Art Prompts
nodes.notes: Parses phi3 output and splits into individual items — one per image to generate.

nodes.name: 🎨 Replicate — Generate Image
nodes.notes: SETUP: Get free API token at replicate.com. Uses SDXL model. Free tier includes $5 credits (~500 images). Version hash is SDXL base — update if needed.

nodes.name: ⏳ Wait 30s for Replicate
nodes.notes: Replicate runs async. Wait 30s then poll for result.

nodes.name: 🔍 Poll Replicate Result
nodes.notes: Polls Replicate for the completed image URL.

nodes.name: 🔀 Replicate Done?
nodes.notes: If succeeded → extract image URL. If not → try HuggingFace fallback.

nodes.name: 🤗 HuggingFace Fallback
nodes.notes: SETUP: Free token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens. Returns binary image data directly. Used as fallback when Replicate fails or quota exceeded.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Normalize Image Output
nodes.notes: Normalizes output from both APIs into consistent format for the packager.

values.content: You are an expert ebook author and digital product creator. You write complete, high-quality, ready-to-sell ebooks and guides. Write in a clear, engaging, professional style. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Write Full eBook
nodes.notes: llama3 writes the COMPLETE ebook content — all chapters, intro, conclusion. This may take 3-5 minutes on CPU VPS. Increase timeout in n8n settings to 600s.

nodes.name: 🖥️ Build Styled eBook HTML
nodes.notes: Builds a beautiful, fully-styled HTML ebook with cover page, TOC, chapters, callout boxes, and back cover. Ready for PDF conversion.

nodes.name: 🎨 Freepik — Generate eBook Cover
nodes.notes: SETUP: Get API key at freepik.com/api. Free tier: 100 AI image generations/day. Generates the ebook cover image.

parameters.command:
=# Write HTML file
cat > {{ $json.html_path }} << 'HTMLEOF'
{{ $json.html_content.substring(0, 50000) }}
HHTMLEOF

# Convert to PDF using wkhtmltopdf
wkhtmltopdf \
  --page-size A4 \
  --margin-top 0 \
  --margin-right 0 \
  --margin-bottom 0 \
  --margin-left 0 \
  --enable-local-file-access \
  --print-media-type \
  {{ $json.html_path }} {{ $json.pdf_path }} 2>&1

# Verify PDF was created
if [ -f "{{ $json.pdf_path }}" ]; then
  echo "SUCCESS: {{ $json.pdf_path }}"
  ls -lh {{ $json.pdf_path }}
else
  echo "FAILED: PDF not created"
fi

nodes.name: 💻 Convert HTML → PDF (wkhtmltopdf)
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Install on VPS with: sudo apt-get install -y wkhtmltopdf xvfb. Runs wkhtmltopdf to convert styled HTML to PDF. For headless server, may need: xvfb-run wkhtmltopdf

values.content: You are an expert at creating beautiful printable templates. You design templates using HTML and CSS that can be printed as high-quality PDFs. Always respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Design Printable Template
nodes.notes: llama3 designs complete printable templates with embedded HTML/CSS. Multiple variants per product.

nodes.name: 💻 Convert Templates → PDFs
nodes.notes: Converts each template variant to PDF. Runs in parallel for all variants.

values.content: You are an expert Notion template designer. You create complete, functional Notion page structures with properties, databases, and content. Always respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Design Notion Template
nodes.notes: llama3 designs the complete Notion template structure including databases and content blocks.

nodes.name: 📓 Create Notion Template Page
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create Notion integration at notion.so/my-integrations. Share a parent page with the integration. Replace YOUR_NOTION_INTEGRATION_TOKEN and YOUR_NOTION_PARENT_PAGE_ID.

nodes.name: 🔀 Collect All Product Files
nodes.notes: Merge point — collects finished files from all 4 pipelines for packaging.

parameters.command:
=PRODUCT_ID="{{ $json.products_to_package[0].product_id }}"
ZIP_DIR="/tmp/${PRODUCT_ID}_package"
ZIP_FILE="/tmp/${PRODUCT_ID}_FINAL.zip"

mkdir -p "$ZIP_DIR"
mkdir -p "$ZIP_DIR/product_files"
mkdir -p "$ZIP_DIR/bonus"

# Copy all PDFs and files into package
for FILE in /tmp/${PRODUCT_ID}*.pdf /tmp/${PRODUCT_ID}*.png /tmp/${PRODUCT_ID}*.jpg; do
  [ -f "$FILE" ] && cp "$FILE" "$ZIP_DIR/product_files/" && echo "Added: $FILE"
done

# Create README
cat > "$ZIP_DIR/README.txt" << 'EOF'
Thank you for your purchase!

HOW TO USE YOUR DIGITAL PRODUCT:
1. Open the PDF files in any PDF viewer
2. Print or use digitally
3. Personal and commercial use included

For questions: support@yourstore.com
EOF

# Create ZIP
cd /tmp && zip -r "$ZIP_FILE" "${PRODUCT_ID}_package/" 2>&1

# Report
if [ -f "$ZIP_FILE" ]; then
  SIZE=$(ls -lh "$ZIP_FILE" | awk '{print $5}')
  echo "SUCCESS|$ZIP_FILE|$SIZE"
else
  echo "FAILED|no zip created"
fi

nodes.name: 📦 Create ZIP Package
nodes.notes: Creates a professional ZIP package with all product files + README. Requires zip installed on VPS: apt-get install zip

nodes.name: ☁️ Upload ZIP to Google Drive
nodes.notes: SETUP: Use same Google OAuth as Sheets. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID — right-click folder in Drive → Get link → extract ID from URL. Creates a shareable download link for storefronts.

nodes.name: 🔗 Make Drive File Public
nodes.notes: Makes the uploaded ZIP file publicly accessible so storefronts can link to it.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Build Final Product Record
nodes.notes: Assembles the complete product record with Google Drive URL for publishing.

nodes.name: 📊 Write to Products_Ready Sheet
nodes.notes: Writes the complete product with Drive URL to Products_Ready. This triggers Workflow 3 on next cycle.

nodes.name: 📊 Update Research Sheet Status
nodes.notes: Marks the original research row as complete so it won't be reprocessed.

meta.description: Phase 2B: Fully automated product creation factory. Routes by type: AI Art (phi3 prompts → Replicate → HuggingFace fallback), eBooks (llama3 writes → HTML → PDF), Printables (llama3 designs → HTML → PDF), Notion templates (llama3 → Notion API). Packages into ZIP, uploads to Google Drive, writes to Products_Ready sheet.
